title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
